dealSummary: Sierra, a startup developing customer-facing AI agents, is raising a $950 million funding round led by Tiger Global and GV at a valuation of over $15 billion.
Autonomous software development platform provider Blitzy secured a $200 million round led by Northzone at a $1.4 billion valuation.
AI cloud inference platform developer DeepInfra secured a $107 million Series B led by 500 Global and Georges Harik.
German quantum computing startup eleQtron raised a €57 million Series A led by Schwarz Digits.
Astrocade, a provider of an AI game development platform, raised $56 million across its Series A and Series B from investors including Sea and Sequoia.
Paris-based mineral exploration startup Lithosquare secured $25 million from investors including World Fund, Kindred Capital, and Daphni.
Enterprise workflow model developer Nace. AI received a $21.5 million seed round led by Walden Catalyst.
Barocal, a UK-based developer of solid cooling and heating technologies, raised $10 million from investors including World Fund, Breakthrough Energy and Cambridge Enterprise Ventures.
leadInvestors: World Fund, Breakthrough Energy, Cambridge Enterprise Ventures
